welcome:
🇺🇸 *US Embassy Alert Bot*

Stay informed about security alerts from U.S. Embassies worldwide.

*Commands:*
/subscribe — Subscribe to alerts for a country
/unsubscribe — Unsubscribe from a country
/my — View your active subscriptions
/latest — Get latest alerts for a country
/help — Show this help message
help:
🇺🇸 *US Embassy Alert Bot — Help*

*Available commands:*

/subscribe — Choose a country and receive alert notifications
/unsubscribe — Stop receiving alerts for a country
/my — Show your current subscriptions
/latest `<country>` — Get the latest alerts for a country (e.g. `/latest Serbia`)
/help — Display this message

*How it works:*
The bot periodically checks RSS feeds from U.S. Embassy websites and sends you new alerts for your subscribed countries.

*Subscription limit:*
Free users can subscribe to up to {max_free} countries. For unlimited subscriptions, contact the bot admin for a crypto payment link.
already_subscribed: ℹ️ You are already subscribed to *{country}* {flag}
not_subscribed: ℹ️ You are not subscribed to *{country}* {flag}
no_subscriptions:
📭 You have no active subscriptions.

Use /subscribe to get started.
sub_limit_reached:
⚠️ You have reached the free subscription limit of *{max_free}* countries.

To subscribe to more countries, you can upgrade via crypto payment.
Contact the bot admin for details.
choose_unsub_country: Choose a country to unsubscribe from:
latest_no_country:
ℹ️ Please specify a country. Example:
`/latest Serbia`
`/latest Germany`
latest_country_not_found:
❌ Country not found: *{query}*

Please check the spelling and try again.
latest_fetch_error: ⚠️ Could not fetch alerts for *{country}* {flag}. Please try again later.
error_generic: ⚠️ An error occurred. Please try again later.
